member.name: M:Mini.Nat.ord(System.Char)
member.summary: convert a char to a natural number

member.name: M:Mini.Nat.op_Subtraction(Mini.Nat,Mini.Nat)
member.summary: substraction of two natural numbers if b > a then a - b = 0

member.name: M:Mini.Nat.op_Multiply(Mini.Nat,Mini.Nat)
member.summary: multiplication of two natural numbers

member.name: M:Mini.Nat.op_Modulus(Mini.Nat,Mini.Nat)
member.summary: remainder of division (Modulo) for natural numbers (e.g. 11 % 3 = 2)

member.name: M:Mini.Nat.op_Explicit(Mini.Nat)
member.summary: cast to bigint

member.name: M:Mini.Nat.op_Explicit(Mini.Nat)
member.summary: cast to byte

member.name: M:Mini.Nat.op_Explicit(Mini.Nat)
member.summary: cast to float

member.name: M:Mini.Nat.op_Explicit(Mini.Nat)
member.summary: cast to int

member.name: M:Mini.Nat.op_Division(Mini.Nat,Mini.Nat)
member.summary: floored division (e.g. 11 / 3 = 3)

member.name: M:Mini.Nat.op_Addition(Mini.Nat,Mini.Nat)
member.summary: addition of two natural numbers

member.name: M:Mini.Nat.nat(System.String)
member.summary: create a natural number from a sequence of digits

member.name: M:Mini.Nat.nat(System.Int32)
member.summary: create a natural number from an int/int64 value

member.name: M:Mini.Nat.nat(System.Numerics.BigInteger)
member.summary: create a natural number from a bigint value

member.name: P:Mini.Nat.Zero
member.summary: the neutral element for addition (used by some generic functions)

member.name: P:Mini.Nat.One
member.summary: the neutral element for multiplication (used by some generic functions)

member.name: M:Mini.Nat.ToBigInteger
member.summary: converts to bigint

member.name: M:Mini.Nat.Pow(Mini.Nat,Mini.Nat)
member.summary: exponentiation, to the power of

member.name: M:Mini.Nat.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: parse a string to a natural number raises a System.FormatException if the number is not correctly formatted

member.name: M:Mini.Nat.Make(System.String)
member.summary: create a natural number from a sequence of digits

member.name: M:Mini.Nat.Make(System.Int32)
member.summary: create a natural number from an int/int64 value

member.name: M:Mini.Nat.Make(System.Numerics.BigInteger)
member.summary: create a natural number from a bigint value

member.name: T:Mini.Nat
member.summary: The type Nat represents natural numbers starting at 0.

member.name: M:Mini.readNat(System.String)
member.summary: converts a string to a natural number raises a Read exception if the string is not formatted correctly

member.name: M:Mini.print``1(``0)
member.summary: writes a string to the console and starts a new line

member.name: M:Mini.show``1(``0)
member.summary: converts a value to a string representation

member.name: M:Mini.getline
member.summary: reads a line from the console. raises an EOF exception if no more line is available

member.name: M:Mini.putline(System.String)
member.summary: writes a string to the console and starts a new line

member.name: M:Mini.putstring(System.String)
member.summary: writes a string to the console

member.name: M:Mini.getchar
member.summary: reads a single character from the console

member.name: M:Mini.putchar(System.Char)
member.summary: outputs a single character to the console

member.name: M:Mini.implode(Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{System.Char})
member.summary: Convert a list of characters into a string.

member.name: M:Mini.explode(System.String)
member.summary: Convert a string into a list of characters.

member.name: M:Mini.panic``1(System.String)
member.summary: simply panics

member.name: M:Mini.error``1(System.String)
member.summary: raises an exception with the given error message

member.name: T:Mini.NumericLiteralN
member.summary: module for writing natural numbers with an "N" postfix (e.g 0N, 99N, ...)

member.name: M:Decorator.Decorator.Underline(System.String)
member.summary: Underlines the given message.

member.name: M:Decorator.Decorator.Italic(System.String)
member.summary: Makes the given message italicized.

member.name: M:Decorator.Decorator.GetOrdinalIndicator(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the ordinal indicator (e.g., "1st", "2nd", "3rd") for a given number.
member.param: The number to be converted to an ordinal string.

member.name: M:Decorator.Decorator.GetNumberEmoji(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns an emoji representation of a number.
member.param: The number to be converted to an emoji (0-10).

member.name: M:Decorator.Decorator.ForegroundColorRGB(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Applies an RGB-based foreground color to the given message.
member.param: The red component of the RGB color (0-255).
The green component of the RGB color (0-255).
The blue component of the RGB color (0-255).

member.name: M:Decorator.Decorator.ForegroundColor(System.ConsoleColor,System.String)
member.summary: Applies a foreground color to the given message.
member.param: The console color for the foreground text.

member.name: M:Decorator.Decorator.ForeAndBackgroundColor(System.ConsoleColor,System.ConsoleColor,System.String)
member.summary: Applies both foreground and background colors to the given message.
member.param: The console color for the foreground text.
The console color for the background.

member.name: M:Decorator.Decorator.Bold(System.String)
member.summary: Makes the given message bold.

member.name: M:Decorator.Decorator.BackgroundColorRGB(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Applies an RGB-based background color to the given message.
member.param: The red component of the RGB color (0-255).
The green component of the RGB color (0-255).
The blue component of the RGB color (0-255).

member.name: M:Decorator.Decorator.BackgroundColor(System.ConsoleColor,System.String)
member.summary: Applies a background color to the given message.
member.param: The console color for the background.

member.name: T:Decorator.Decorator
member.summary: Provides utilities for decorating console output, such as applying colors, styles, and formatting to text strings.

member.name: F:Assertify.Assertify.showReductions
member.summary: Determines whether to display the reductions in the output.

member.name: F:Assertify.Assertify.showHistory
member.summary: Determines whether to display the history in the output.

member.name: P:Assertify.Assertify.ShowReductions(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Configures whether reductions should be displayed in the output.

member.name: P:Assertify.Assertify.ShowHistory(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Configures whether the history should be displayed in the output.

member.name: M:Assertify.Assertify.Test(Microsoft.FSharp.Quotations.FSharpExpr{System.Boolean},Assertify.History,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.String})
member.summary: Tests an expression with a history and outputs failure information if the test fails.
member.param: An optional message to include in the output.

member.name: M:Assertify.Assertify.Test(Microsoft.FSharp.Quotations.FSharpExpr{System.Boolean},Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.String})
member.summary: Tests an expression and outputs failure information if the test fails.
member.param: An optional message to include in the output.

member.name: M:Assertify.Assertify.Fail(Microsoft.FSharp.Quotations.FSharpExpr,Assertify.History,System.String)
member.summary: Fails the current assertion with an expression, a history and a custom message.
member.param: The expression to include in the failure output.

member.name: M:Assertify.Assertify.Fail(Microsoft.FSharp.Quotations.FSharpExpr,System.String)
member.summary: Fails the current assertion with an expression and a custom message.
member.param: The expression to include in the failure output.

member.name: M:Assertify.Assertify.Fail(System.String)
member.summary: Fails the current assertion with a custom message.

member.name: T:Assertify.Assertify
member.summary: Library to assert and (ver)ify.

member.name: F:Assertify.History.EvaluatedExpressions@
member.summary: Stores the history of successfully evaluated expressions.

member.name: P:Assertify.History.EvaluatedExpressions(Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{Microsoft.FSharp.Quotations.FSharpExpr{Microsoft.FSharp.Core.Unit}})
member.summary: Stores the history of successfully evaluated expressions.

member.name: P:Assertify.History.EvaluatedExpressions
member.summary: Stores the history of successfully evaluated expressions.

member.name: M:Assertify.History.IsEmpty
member.summary: Checks whether the history is empty, meaning no expressions have been evaluated.

member.name: M:Assertify.History.EvalAndAdd(Microsoft.FSharp.Quotations.FSharpExpr{Microsoft.FSharp.Core.Unit})
member.summary: Evaluates the given expression and adds it to history if successful.

member.name: M:Assertify.History.#ctor(Microsoft.FSharp.Quotations.FSharpExpr{Microsoft.FSharp.Core.Unit})
member.summary: Initializes History with a single expression and evaluates it immediately. Throws an exception if evaluation fails.
member.param: The initial expression to evaluate and store.

member.name: M:Assertify.History.#ctor(Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{Microsoft.FSharp.Quotations.FSharpExpr{Microsoft.FSharp.Core.Unit}})
member.summary: Initializes History with multiple expressions and evaluates them immediately. Throws an exception if any evaluation fails.
member.param: The list of initial expressions to evaluate and store.

member.name: T:Assertify.History
member.summary: Maintains a history of evaluated F# expressions.

member.name: P:Assertify.AssertifyException.StackTrace
member.summary: Gets the stack trace of the exception, formatted with markers for clarity.

member.name: P:Assertify.AssertifyException.Message
member.summary: Gets the exception message, inheriting from the base Exception class.

member.name: T:Assertify.AssertifyException
member.summary: Represents a custom exception used by Assertify for failed assertions.

member.name: P:Assertify.TimeoutAttribute.Timeout
member.summary: The timeout of a unit test.

member.name: T:Assertify.TimeoutAttribute
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Microsoft.VisualStudio.TestTools.UnitTesting.TimeoutAttribute class.
member.param: The timeout of a unit test.

member.name: T:Assertify.TestMethodAttribute
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Microsoft.VisualStudio.TestTools.UnitTesting.TestMethodAttribute class.

member.name: T:Assertify.TestClassAttribute
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Microsoft.VisualStudio.TestTools.UnitTesting.TestClassAttribute class.

member.summary: Fails the current test with an expression and a custom message.
member.param: The expression to include in the failure output.

member.summary: Fails the current test with an expression and a custom message.
member.param: The expression to include in the failure output.

member.name: M:Assertify.op_BangBang(System.String)
member.summary: Fails the current test with a custom message.

member.name: M:Assertify.op_MinusQmarkQmarkGreater(Microsoft.FSharp.Quotations.FSharpExpr{System.Boolean},Assertify.History,System.String)
member.summary: Tests a boolean expression using Assertify.Test with a history and a custom message.
member.param: The custom message to include in the test output.

member.name: M:Assertify.op_MinusQmarkGreater(Microsoft.FSharp.Quotations.FSharpExpr{System.Boolean},System.String)
member.summary: Tests a boolean expression using Assertify.Test with a custom message.
member.param: The custom message to include in the test output.

member.name: M:Assertify.op_Dynamic(Microsoft.FSharp.Quotations.FSharpExpr{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Tests a boolean expression using Assertify.Test.
